title: K2 Winter Ridge Strategy
excerpt: A technical push on a narrow weather window with a small, fast-moving team.
content: We approached the ridge with a tight timeline and a singular goal: keep the team light, decisive, and safe. Each pitch was rehearsed with clear roles, and we shifted to a night movement plan to avoid unstable snow layers.
highlights: Staggered summit bid to manage exposure

title: Everest Summit Window
excerpt: How we navigated crowd management, oxygen strategy, and a late-season summit bid.
content: The summit push was defined by short, clear windows. We aligned our rotation plan with a high-acclimatization protocol and prioritized quiet coordination at the South Col.

title: Patagonia Icefield Traverse
excerpt: A five-day traverse of blue-ice corridors with whiteout navigation drills.
content: Patagonia tested every system: wind, visibility, and cold. We set a strict navigation cadence with route markers every 150 meters and practiced crevasse rescue in low visibility.
